testcase.name: testDefaultsExist
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T14:10:55.451+08:00 INFO 12320 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.qiwenshare.file.RbacTest]: RbacTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-29T14:10:55.454+08:00 INFO 12320 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.qiwenshare.file.FileApplication for test class com.qiwenshare.file.RbacTest Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@a0464ce] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@212189 wrapping conn10: url=jdbc:h2:mem:qiwen_file_test user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: SELECT role_id,role_name,description,available FROM role ==> Parameters: <== Columns: ROLE_ID, ROLE_NAME, DESCRIPTION, AVAILABLE <== Row: 1, admin, 管理员, 1 <== Row: 2, editor, 编辑者, 1 <== Row: 3, viewer, 只读者, 1 <== Total: 3 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@a0464ce] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@a0464ce] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@a0464ce]

testcase.name: testDeleteRoleCleansUp

) ==> Parameters: tmp(String), 临时(String), 1(Integer) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] from current transaction ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM user_role WHERE (user_id = ?) ==> Parameters: user002(String) <== Updates: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO user_role ( user_id, role_id ) VALUES ( ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: user002(String), 4(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] from current transaction ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM role WHERE role_id=? ==> Parameters: 4(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] from current transaction ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM user_role WHERE (role_id = ?) ==> Parameters: 4(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] from current transaction ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM role_permission WHERE (role_id = ?) ==> Parameters: 4(Long) <== Updates: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] from current transaction ==> Preparing: SELECT id,user_id,role_id FROM user_role WHERE (user_id = ?) ==> Parameters: user002(String) <== Total: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4276bd6]

testcase.name: testCreateUpdateAndAssign
testcase.system-out: Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1497285382 wrapping conn10: url=jdbc:h2:mem:qiwen_file_test user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO role ( role_name, description, available ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: tester(String), 测试角色(String), 1(Integer) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] from current transaction ==> Preparing: UPDATE role SET role_name=?, description=?, available=? WHERE role_id=? ==> Parameters: tester-updated(String), 测试角色(String), 1(Integer), 5(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] from current transaction ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM user_role WHERE (user_id = ?) ==> Parameters: user001(String) <== Updates: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO user_role ( user_id, role_id ) VALUES ( ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: user001(String), 5(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] from current transaction ==> Preparing: SELECT id,user_id,role_id FROM user_role WHERE (user_id = ?) ==> Parameters: user001(String) <== Columns: ID, USER_ID, ROLE_ID <== Row: 2, user001, 5 <== Total: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] from current transaction ==> Preparing: SELECT role_id,role_name,description,available FROM role WHERE role_id IN ( ? ) ==> Parameters: 5(Long) <== Columns: ROLE_ID, ROLE_NAME, DESCRIPTION, AVAILABLE <== Row: 5, tester-updated, 测试角色, 1 <== Total: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@9a56d2b]

testcase.name: testAssignRolePermissions
testcase.system-out: Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1903564506 wrapping conn10: url=jdbc:h2:mem:qiwen_file_test user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO role ( role_name, description, available ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: p-test(String), 权限测试(String), 1(Integer) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] from current transaction ==> Preparing: SELECT permission_id,parent_id,permission_name,resource_type,permission_code,order_num FROM permission ==> Parameters: <== Columns: PERMISSION_ID, PARENT_ID, PERMISSION_NAME, RESOURCE_TYPE, PERMISSION_CODE, ORDER_NUM <== Row: 1, null, 文件管理, 0, file, 1 <== Row: 2, null, 用户管理, 0, user, 2 <== Row: 3, null, 系统管理, 0, system, 3 <== Row: 4, null, 管理面板, 0, dashboard, 4 <== Row: 5, 1, 文件上传, 1, file:upload, 1 <== Row: 6, 1, 文件下载, 1, file:download, 2 <== Row: 7, 1, 文件删除, 1, file:delete, 3 <== Row: 8, 1, 文件分享, 1, file:share, 4 <== Row: 9, 2, 用户列表, 1, user:list, 1 <== Row: 10, 2, 角色分配, 1, user:role, 2 <== Row: 11, 3, 公告管理, 1, system:notice, 1 <== Total: 11 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] from current transaction ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM role_permission WHERE (role_id = ?) ==> Parameters: 6(Long) <== Updates: 0 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO role_permission ( role_id, permission_id ) VALUES ( ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: 6(Long), 1(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO role_permission ( role_id, permission_id ) VALUES ( ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: 6(Long), 2(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO role_permission ( role_id, permission_id ) VALUES ( ?, ? ) ==> Parameters: 6(Long), 3(Long) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] from current transaction ==> Preparing: SELECT id,role_id,permission_id FROM role_permission WHERE (role_id = ?) ==> Parameters: 6(Long) <== Columns: ID, ROLE_ID, PERMISSION_ID <== Row: 1, 6, 1 <== Row: 2, 6, 2 <== Row: 3, 6, 3 <== Total: 3 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@51768401]

testcase.name: testPermissionTree
testcase.system-out: Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@772ce28e] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1204402414 wrapping conn10: url=jdbc:h2:mem:qiwen_file_test user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: SELECT permission_id,parent_id,permission_name,resource_type,permission_code,order_num FROM permission ==> Parameters: <== Columns: PERMISSION_ID, PARENT_ID, PERMISSION_NAME, RESOURCE_TYPE, PERMISSION_CODE, ORDER_NUM <== Row: 1, null, 文件管理, 0, file, 1 <== Row: 2, null, 用户管理, 0, user, 2 <== Row: 3, null, 系统管理, 0, system, 3 <== Row: 4, null, 管理面板, 0, dashboard, 4 <== Row: 5, 1, 文件上传, 1, file:upload, 1 <== Row: 6, 1, 文件下载, 1, file:download, 2 <== Row: 7, 1, 文件删除, 1, file:delete, 3 <== Row: 8, 1, 文件分享, 1, file:share, 4 <== Row: 9, 2, 用户列表, 1, user:list, 1 <== Row: 10, 2, 角色分配, 1, user:role, 2 <== Row: 11, 3, 公告管理, 1, system:notice, 1 <== Total: 11 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@772ce28e] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@772ce28e] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@772ce28e]
